what_it_does: Stores ledger metadata for a PNG design asset named Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_Yellow (2) in the design-assets channel, including blob reference, MIME type, authorship, versioning, and empty dimensions/alt/links.
observations: Image asset metadata file with YAML frontmatter and no body content
MIME is image/png but width and height are recorded as 0
Version 1 mirrors the top-level blob and has empty alt text
created and updated timestamps are identical
Address uses image://design-assets/... and blob uses blob://b2:... schemes
standouts: Dimensions are 0x0 despite being a PNG image
Version 1 has empty alt text and no links
Source is 'dragnet' with a session-based author identifier
conventions: YAML frontmatter ledger format with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, dimensions, timestamps, and versions array
Uses URI-style addresses for image and blob references
Version object mirrors top-level metadata fields
concerns: Width and height are zero, suggesting incomplete ingestion or missing image analysis
Alt text is empty, reducing accessibility and searchability
No links or relationships are captured for the asset
notes: A bare asset ledger stub for a yellow circular 'V' icon concept, currently lacking dimensional, descriptive, and relational metadata.
questions: Why are width and height zero for a PNG asset?
What does the 'dragnet' source indicate about provenance?
Is the empty alt text awaiting description or intentionally omitted?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog an image asset, but it currently functions as a minimal stub because dimensions, alt text, and relationships are not populated.
intention_signals: Capture and version a logo icon concept asset so it can be referenced by blob and channel address within a design-asset ledger.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record and blob reference for a specific icon concept image, which a fused system can use to locate the underlying PNG and reconcile with richer asset descriptions.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata file for a PNG design-assets logo icon named Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_Yellow (2), with blob reference, zero dimensions, empty alt text, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a versioned logo icon image asset in the design-assets channel for reference and retrieval.
